I. User Guide 3

The table below details the Medicare Consumer Assessment of Healthcare Providers and Systems (MCAHPS) survey types,
sample coverage, and type of care assessed. The table is included to provide context for the contents of this data dictionary
as well as information on the speciﬁc years for which different types of data are available.
